source: Android OfflineHrDataTest; iOS raw parser indexes out of range for this malformed payload

expected.migrationOwnership: Protocol-only characterization excluded from first common KMP migration because current Android/iOS behavior is platform-specific. Use this vector to make an explicit shared parser policy before promoting this behavior to common code.

notes: Android currently throws when raw type-1 offline HR data ends before the correctedHr byte. iOS is excluded because the current parser can terminate on out-of-range Data indexing instead of throwing a catchable parser error.
